title: tagetes linifolia
intro: Tagetes linifolia, also known as the Mexican marigold or slender marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tagetes linifolia include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antibacterial and antiviral properties. Tagetes linifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
